headline: Morgan Rogers
body: 🚨 EXCLUSIVE: Chelsea reach verbal agreement with Aston Villa to sign Morgan Rogers⁠. Bid of £117m accepted by AVFC & being finalised. 6+1y contract, medical Monday⁠. AFC interested but 23yo attacker wanted CFC; Xabi Alonso instrumental TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/6390212… Link Chelsea reach verbal agreement for Morgan Rogers signing The 23-year-old's contract at Villa Park runs until 2030. nytimes.com
raw_text:
🚨 EXCLUSIVE: Chelsea reach verbal agreement with Aston Villa to sign Morgan Rogers⁠. Bid of £117m accepted by #AVFC & being finalised. 6+1y contract, medical Monday⁠. #AFC interested but 23yo attacker wanted #CFC; Xabi Alonso instrumental @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/6390212…

Link



Chelsea reach verbal agreement for Morgan Rogers signing

The 23-year-old's contract at Villa Park runs until 2030.
nytimes.com
